files_changed: src/renderer/game/scenes/ZuzuGarageScene.js (M — added preload, added loadLayout import, replaced 60 literal positions with this.layout.<name> references)

extended_literal_check.command: grep for addWall|addVisibleWall|addExit|addInteractable|fillCircle|fillRect|fillRoundedRect|lineBetween with leading numeric literal
extended_literal_check.result: 1 match — line 48 floor grid loop (lineBetween(0, y, width, y)). Loop-generated, exempt per spec section 7-8. The 0 is the loop x-axis origin, not a static anchor.

unreferenced_layout_names_check.method: iterated Object.keys(layout.objects), confirmed each appears as 'this.layout.<name>' in scene source

notes.world_size_confirmation: Used 800x600 per the scene's own getWorldSize() return. All `width / 2` references resolved to 400 (not 512). All `width - N` resolved against 800. All `height - N` resolved against 600. The original Block-2 paste mention of 1024x768 was rejected as incorrect.

first_dispatch_files_created.loadLayout.js: CREATED at src/renderer/game/utils/loadLayout.js. Did not previously exist. Mirrors style of failureMath.js (named export + default export, JSDoc).
first_dispatch_files_created.CLAUDE.md: CREATED at repo root. Did not previously exist. Contains only the layout-system rule under '## Layout system rule' heading per spec template.

positions_left_in_code_with_reasons.code: for (let x = 0; x < width; x += 60) floorGfx.lineBetween(x, 0, x, height); for (let y = 0; y < height; y += 60) floorGfx.lineBetween(0, y, width, y);
positions_left_in_code_with_reasons.reason: Loop-generated floor grid lines. Per spec section 8 (loop-generated positions are exempt unless the loop bounds are literals worth capturing). Bounds use width/height from getWorldSize(); only the step size 60 is a literal, and it controls a derived sequence rather than a static anchor. Leaving in code.
600ms timer delay — a temporal value, not a coordinate. Not in scope for layout extraction.

positions_left_in_code_with_reasons.source_lines: Various setOrigin(0.5), setOrigin(0.5).setDepth(2), setStrokeStyle(N, 0xCOLOR), interaction radius (e.g. 70, 80) and font sizes
positions_left_in_code_with_reasons.reason: Per spec rule: setOrigin args are origin floats (0..1), NOT pixel coordinates. Stroke widths, depths, font sizes, interaction radii are styling/behavior, not layout positions. All left in code.

notes.behavioral_changes: NONE. Zero touches to onInteract bodies, dialog strings, quest conditionals, audio calls, save calls, scene transitions, upgrade visibility logic, onboarding logic, or physics. Verified by reading the diff line-by-line: every change is either an import, a preload addition, the loadLayout() call, or a literal-to-this.layout.NAME swap.
notes.computed_positions_resolved_to_literals: Every `width / 2`, `width - N`, `height - N`, `bikeX +/- N`, `bikeY +/- N`, `labDoorX +/- N`, `thermalDoorX +/- N` was resolved to its concrete literal in the JSON. Original expressions are preserved in `_note` fields for human-roundtrip review.
notes.preserved_runtime_property_assignments: this._workbenchX and this._workbenchY (lines 105-106) are kept on the instance — they now read from this.layout.workbench rather than literal 140/160. Other code in the codebase may reference these properties; preserving the assignment guarantees no behavioral drift.
notes.scope_compliance: Did NOT touch any file under .claude/agents/, .claude/swarm/, .claude/agent-memory/, or any scene file other than ZuzuGarageScene.js. Did NOT pre-plan future agent dispatches. Per orchestrator scope guard.

next_agent_suggestions.rationale: User's recommended next scene per dispatch prompt. StreetBlockScene is the first scene the player exits ZuzuGarageScene into — natural sequencing for visual review.
